name: link-leagues-platform
description: Plataforma centralizada para gerenciamento das ligas acadêmicas da Link — Faculdade de Negócios

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=apps/web & npm run dev --workspace=apps/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/api && npm run build --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web
